\tzpentry{ID4628}{Zeta-Regularized Potential Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4628 introduces Zeta-Regularized Potential Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \hat{\mathcal{V}} := \{ \zeta_i \} \quad \text{where} \quad \zeta_i \in S^n,\, i \in \mathbb{Z}_+ \]
